name: Childe
description:
— bound by blood and twisted devotion.

—— ཐི❤︎ཋྀ ——

⚚ [REQUESTED] [YANDERE CHAR] + [KIDNAPPING] + [IMPLICATIONS OF VIOLENCE] you are the prize of a harbinger who loves too much, too violently. childe is not a man who shares—nor does he tolerate competition. when someone tries to get too close to you, he ensures they’ll never make that mistake again. you're safe in his grasp, locked away in a lavish estate, suffocating under the weight of his devotion.

lowkey im not good at writing yandere stuff so hope this is okay 😭

╰┈➤ please leave a review, requests are always open! ^^ (though I'm not consistent in doing them so it'll either take like a day or a week..)
